questionHtml: Explain, by reference to charge carriers in the wire, how the magnetic force on the wire arises.
markschemeHtml:
charge/carriers are moving in a magnetic field ✓

 

there is a magnetic force on them / quote F = qvB

OR

this creates a magnetic field that interacts with the external magnetic field ✓

 

Accept electrons.

For MP2, the force must be identified as acting on charge / carriers.

meta.title: Explain, by reference to charge carriers in the wire, how the magnetic force on the wire arises.
